notes: Two-dataset canonical-agent pilot grid for hopper-medium-replay-v2 and hopper-medium-expert-v2 only.
A passthrough original ExpRank_MR branch is supplied by the run spec, so total branches per dataset/seed are 15.
The injected branches preserve the old canonical trainer/network/critic/update loop and replace only the negative-advantage multiplier in SNA2C_IQLV_ExpRankAgent.
Effective negative coefficient equals 0.11 * negative_scale * optional detached distance taper.
This is pilot-only and cannot populate the formal D4RL-9 table.
